title: justicia aequilabris subsp. glabribracteata
intro: Justicia aequilabris subsp. glabribracteata, also known as the Glabrous-bracted Justicia, is a type of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family, native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Justicia aequilabris subsp. glabribracteata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
